name: Deluxe Cheesecake
recipeInstructions: Press the Graham Cracker Crust mixture into a 10-inch springform pan and set aside. Beat the cream cheese at high speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy; gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating well after each addition. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract. Pour into prepared pan and bake at 375 degrees for 35 minutes or until the cheesecake is set. Beat the sour cream at medium speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes. Add 3 tablespoons sugar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract, then beat for an additional minute. Spread over the cheesecake. Bake at 500 degrees for 5 minutes. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack before chilling for at least 8 hours.
